<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8"/>
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0"/>
<title>LSTM Stock Price Prediction — BARC.L</title>
<style>
  @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=JetBrains+Mono:wght@400;600&family=Inter:wght@300;400;500;600;700&display=swap');

  :root {
    --dark:   #0d1117;
    --panel:  #161b22;
    --border: #30363d;
    --blue:   #58a6ff;
    --green:  #3fb950;
    --red:    #f85149;
    --yellow: #e3b341;
    --purple: #bc8cff;
    --orange: #ffa657;
    --gray:   #8b949e;
    --white:  #f0f6fc;
    --teal:   #39d353;
  }

  * { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }

  body {
    background: var(--dark);
    color: var(--white);
    font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif;
    font-size: 15px;
    line-height: 1.7;
    padding: 0;
  }

  /* ── HERO ── */
  .hero {
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, #0d1117 0%, #161b22 50%, #0d1f3c 100%);
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
    padding: 64px 32px 52px;
    text-align: center;
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
  }
  .hero::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute; inset: 0;
    background: radial-gradient(ellipse 80% 60% at 50% 0%, rgba(88,166,255,0.08) 0%, transparent 70%);
    pointer-events: none;
  }
  .hero-label {
    display: inline-block;
    background: rgba(88,166,255,0.12);
    border: 1px solid rgba(88,166,255,0.3);
    color: var(--blue);
    font-size: 12px;
    font-weight: 600;
    letter-spacing: 2px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    padding: 4px 14px;
    border-radius: 20px;
    margin-bottom: 20px;
  }
  .hero h1 {
    font-size: clamp(28px, 5vw, 48px);
    font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: -1px;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--white) 0%, var(--blue) 60%, var(--purple) 100%);
    -webkit-background-clip: text;
    -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;
    background-clip: text;
    margin-bottom: 14px;
  }
  .hero p {
    color: var(--gray);
    font-size: 17px;
    max-width: 640px;
    margin: 0 auto 28px;
  }
  .badges {
    display: flex;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
    gap: 10px;
    justify-content: center;
    margin-bottom: 0;
  }
  .badge {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 7px;
    padding: 5px 14px;
    border-radius: 6px;
    font-size: 12px;
    font-weight: 600;
    border: 1px solid;
  }
  .badge-blue   { background: rgba(88,166,255,0.1);  border-color: rgba(88,166,255,0.35);  color: var(--blue);   }
  .badge-red    { background: rgba(248,81,73,0.1);   border-color: rgba(248,81,73,0.35);   color: var(--red);    }
  .badge-orange { background: rgba(255,166,87,0.1);  border-color: rgba(255,166,87,0.35);  color: var(--orange); }
  .badge-purple { background: rgba(188,140,255,0.1); border-color: rgba(188,140,255,0.35); color: var(--purple); }

  /* ── LAYOUT ── */
  .container {
    max-width: 960px;
    margin: 0 auto;
    padding: 0 28px 80px;
  }

  /* ── SECTION ── */
  .section {
    margin-top: 56px;
  }
  .section-label {
    font-size: 11px;
    font-weight: 600;
    letter-spacing: 2.5px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--blue);
    margin-bottom: 8px;
  }
  .section h2 {
    font-size: 22px;
    font-weight: 700;
    color: var(--white);
    margin-bottom: 14px;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 10px;
  }
  .section h2 .icon { font-size: 22px; }
  .section p, .section li {
    color: #cdd9e5;
    font-size: 14.5px;
    line-height: 1.75;
  }
  .divider {
    border: none;
    border-top: 1px solid var(--border);
    margin: 48px 0 0;
  }

  /* ── CHART ── */
  .chart-wrap {
    margin: 20px 0 0;
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
    border-radius: 10px;
    overflow: hidden;
    background: var(--panel);
  }
  .chart-wrap img {
    width: 100%;
    display: block;
  }
  .chart-caption {
    padding: 11px 16px;
    font-size: 12.5px;
    color: var(--gray);
    border-top: 1px solid var(--border);
    font-style: italic;
  }

  /* ── TABLE ── */
  table {
    width: 100%;
    border-collapse: collapse;
    margin-top: 16px;
    font-size: 14px;
  }
  th {
    background: var(--panel);
    color: var(--gray);
    font-size: 11px;
    font-weight: 600;
    letter-spacing: 1.5px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    padding: 10px 14px;
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
    text-align: left;
  }
  td {
    padding: 9px 14px;
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
    color: #cdd9e5;
    background: #0d1117;
    font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace;
    font-size: 13px;
  }
  tr:hover td { background: var(--panel); }
  td:first-child { color: var(--blue); }

  /* ── CODE ── */
  pre {
    background: var(--panel);
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
    border-radius: 8px;
    padding: 18px 20px;
    overflow-x: auto;
    margin-top: 16px;
    font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace;
    font-size: 13px;
    line-height: 1.6;
    color: #adbac7;
  }
  pre .kw   { color: var(--purple); }
  pre .str  { color: var(--green);  }
  pre .num  { color: var(--orange); }
  pre .cmt  { color: var(--gray); font-style: italic; }
  pre .fn   { color: var(--blue);   }

  /* ── METRICS ROW ── */
  .metrics {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(160px, 1fr));
    gap: 14px;
    margin-top: 18px;
  }
  .metric-card {
    background: var(--panel);
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
    border-radius: 10px;
    padding: 18px 20px;
    text-align: center;
  }
  .metric-card .val {
    font-size: 28px;
    font-weight: 700;
    font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace;
    color: var(--blue);
    display: block;
  }
  .metric-card .lbl {
    font-size: 11.5px;
    color: var(--gray);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 1px;
    margin-top: 4px;
  }

  /* ── CALLOUT ── */
  .callout {
    background: rgba(88,166,255,0.07);
    border-left: 3px solid var(--blue);
    border-radius: 0 8px 8px 0;
    padding: 14px 18px;
    margin-top: 16px;
    font-size: 14px;
    color: #cdd9e5;
  }

  /* ── CHECKLIST ── */
  .checklist { list-style: none; margin-top: 12px; }
  .checklist li {
    padding: 5px 0;
    color: #cdd9e5;
    font-size: 14px;
  }
  .checklist li::before {
    content: '○ ';
    color: var(--border);
    font-size: 13px;
  }

  /* ── FOOTER ── */
  footer {
    text-align: center;
    padding: 40px 20px;
    border-top: 1px solid var(--border);
    color: var(--gray);
    font-size: 13px;
    margin-top: 60px;
  }
  footer a { color: var(--blue); text-decoration: none; }
  footer a:hover { text-decoration: underline; }
  .author-chip {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 8px;
    background: var(--panel);
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
    border-radius: 999px;
    padding: 8px 20px;
    font-size: 14px;
    color: var(--white);
    margin-bottom: 14px;
  }
  .author-chip .dot {
    width: 8px; height: 8px;
    background: var(--green);
    border-radius: 50%;
  }
</style>
</head>
<body>

<!-- ═══ HERO ═══ -->
<div class="hero">
  <div class="hero-label">Deep Learning · Finance · Time Series</div>
  <h1>🧠 Stock Price Prediction<br>with LSTM</h1>
  <p>Forecasting weekly closing prices of <strong>Barclays PLC (BARC.L)</strong> using a stacked LSTM neural network trained on 2.5 years of historical market data.</p>
  <div class="badges">
    <span class="badge badge-blue">🐍 Python 3.7+</span>
    <span class="badge badge-red">🔴 Keras / TensorFlow</span>
    <span class="badge badge-orange">📊 Pandas · NumPy</span>
    <span class="badge badge-purple">🔬 scikit-learn</span>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="container">

  <!-- ═══ OVERVIEW ═══ -->
  <div class="section">
    <div class="section-label">Overview</div>
    <h2><span class="icon">📌</span> Project Summary</h2>
    <p>This project builds a <strong>Long Short-Term Memory (LSTM)</strong> neural network to forecast stock prices — one of the most challenging problems in financial machine learning. Unlike traditional models, LSTMs learn long-range temporal dependencies, making them well-suited for financial time series where past behaviour influences future price movements.</p>
    <br>
    <p>The model is trained on weekly OHLCV data for <strong>Barclays PLC (LON: BARC)</strong> from January 2020 to August 2022, covering the COVID-19 crash, the recovery rally, and the 2022 macro downturn — a highly varied test of the model's generalisation ability.</p>
  </div>

  <hr class="divider"/>

  <!-- ═══ CHART 1 ═══ -->
  <div class="section">
    <div class="section-label">Data</div>
    <h2><span class="icon">📈</span> Closing Price History</h2>
    <p>Full BARC.L weekly close price history. The vertical dashed line marks the 80/20 train/test boundary.</p>
    <div class="chart-wrap">
      <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Close Price History"/>
      <div class="chart-caption">Fig 1 — BARC.L weekly closing prices (Jan 2020 – Aug 2022), 137 data points total.</div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <hr class="divider"/>

  <!-- ═══ ARCHITECTURE ═══ -->
  <div class="section">
    <div class="section-label">Model</div>
    <h2><span class="icon">🏗️</span> LSTM Architecture</h2>
    <p>A stacked two-layer LSTM followed by fully connected Dense layers for regression output.</p>
    <div class="chart-wrap">
      <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="LSTM Architecture"/>
      <div class="chart-caption">Fig 2 — Model data flow: 60-step input window → LSTM×2 → Dense layers → single price prediction.</div>
    </div>
    <table>
      <thead><tr><th>Layer</th><th>Type</th><th>Units</th><th>Notes</th></tr></thead>
      <tbody>
        <tr><td>Input</td><td>—</td><td>60 × 1</td><td>60-week lookback window</td></tr>
        <tr><td>LSTM 1</td><td>LSTM</td><td>50</td><td>return_sequences=True</td></tr>
        <tr><td>LSTM 2</td><td>LSTM</td><td>50</td><td>return_sequences=False</td></tr>
        <tr><td>Dense 1</td><td>Dense</td><td>12</td><td>Hidden layer</td></tr>
        <tr><td>Dense 2</td><td>Dense</td><td>1</td><td>Price output</td></tr>
      </tbody>
    </table>
  </div>

  <hr class="divider"/>

  <!-- ═══ DATA PREP ═══ -->
  <div class="section">
    <div class="section-label">Preprocessing</div>
    <h2><span class="icon">📐</span> Data Preparation</h2>
    <p>Raw close prices are MinMax scaled to [0, 1] before training to stabilise gradient updates. The dataset is split into 80% training and 20% testing with no data leakage. Each training sample uses a <strong>60-timestep sliding window</strong> to predict the next week's price.</p>
    <div class="chart-wrap">
      <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Train/Test Split"/>
      <div class="chart-caption">Fig 3 — Scaled price data with 80% training (blue) and 20% test (orange) regions highlighted.</div>
    </div>
    <pre><span class="kw">from</span> sklearn.preprocessing <span class="kw">import</span> MinMaxScaler

scaler = <span class="fn">MinMaxScaler</span>(feature_range=(<span class="num">0</span>, <span class="num">1</span>))
scaled_data = scaler.<span class="fn">fit_transform</span>(dataset)

training_data_len = math.<span class="fn">ceil</span>(<span class="fn">len</span>(dataset) * <span class="num">.8</span>)  <span class="cmt"># → 110 weeks</span>

<span class="cmt"># Build sliding windows: [t-60 ... t-1] → predict t</span>
<span class="kw">for</span> i <span class="kw">in</span> <span class="fn">range</span>(<span class="num">60</span>, <span class="fn">len</span>(train_data)):
    x_train.<span class="fn">append</span>(train_data[i<span class="num">-60</span>:i, <span class="num">0</span>])
    y_train.<span class="fn">append</span>(train_data[i, <span class="num">0</span>])</pre>
  </div>

  <hr class="divider"/>

  <!-- ═══ TRAINING ═══ -->
  <div class="section">
    <div class="section-label">Training</div>
    <h2><span class="icon">🔁</span> Model Training</h2>
    <p>Compiled with the <strong>Adam</strong> optimiser and <strong>Mean Squared Error</strong> loss. Trained for 2 epochs with a batch size of 2.</p>
    <div class="chart-wrap">
      <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Training Loss"/>
      <div class="chart-caption">Fig 4 — Training vs validation MSE loss over epochs. Loss drops sharply from 0.1082 → 0.0053.</div>
    </div>
    <table>
      <thead><tr><th>Epoch</th><th>Training Loss (MSE)</th></tr></thead>
      <tbody>
        <tr><td>1</td><td>0.1082</td></tr>
        <tr><td>2</td><td>0.0053</td></tr>
      </tbody>
    </table>
  </div>

  <hr class="divider"/>

  <!-- ═══ PREDICTIONS ═══ -->
  <div class="section">
    <div class="section-label">Results</div>
    <h2><span class="icon">🎯</span> Predictions vs Actual</h2>
    <p>Predicted prices (red dashed) overlaid against actual prices (green) across the held-out test set. The shaded region shows the prediction error band.</p>
    <div class="chart-wrap">
      <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Predictions vs Actual"/>
      <div class="chart-caption">Fig 5 — LSTM predictions vs actual BARC.L prices on the 20% test set (27 weeks).</div>
    </div>
    <div class="callout">
      💡 The model captures the <strong>general downward trend</strong> in early 2022 and the partial recovery in mid-2022, though it slightly lags sharp reversals — a known characteristic of LSTM models trained on short windows with limited epochs.
    </div>
    <div class="metrics">
      <div class="metric-card"><span class="val">26.15</span><div class="lbl">RMSE (GBx)</div></div>
      <div class="metric-card"><span class="val">27</span><div class="lbl">Test Samples</div></div>
      <div class="metric-card"><span class="val">60</span><div class="lbl">Lookback Window</div></div>
      <div class="metric-card"><span class="val">110</span><div class="lbl">Training Weeks</div></div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <hr class="divider"/>

  <!-- ═══ RESIDUALS ═══ -->
  <div class="section">
    <div class="section-label">Evaluation</div>
    <h2><span class="icon">📉</span> Error Analysis</h2>
    <p>Residuals plotted over time and their frequency distribution. Ideally residuals are centred around zero with no systematic drift.</p>
    <div class="chart-wrap">
      <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Residuals"/>
      <div class="chart-caption">Fig 6 — Left: prediction residuals over time. Right: error distribution histogram.</div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <hr class="divider"/>

  <!-- ═══ INSTALLATION ═══ -->
  <div class="section">
    <div class="section-label">Setup</div>
    <h2><span class="icon">⚙️</span> Installation</h2>
    <pre><span class="cmt"># Clone the repository</span>
git clone https://github.com/Ak28071999/lstm-stock-prediction.git
cd lstm-stock-prediction

<span class="cmt"># Install dependencies</span>
pip install -r requirements.txt</pre>
    <pre><span class="cmt"># requirements.txt</span>
numpy
pandas
matplotlib
scikit-learn
tensorflow&gt;=2.0
keras
pandas-datareader
yfinance</pre>
    <pre><span class="cmt"># Launch notebook</span>
jupyter notebook lstm_stock_prediction.ipynb</pre>
    <p style="margin-top:14px;">To run on a different stock, swap the ticker:</p>
    <pre><span class="kw">import</span> yfinance <span class="kw">as</span> yf

ticker = <span class="str">'AAPL'</span>   <span class="cmt"># ← change this</span>
df = yf.<span class="fn">download</span>(ticker, start=<span class="str">'2020-01-01'</span>, end=<span class="str">'2023-01-01'</span>, interval=<span class="str">'1wk'</span>)
data = df.<span class="fn">filter</span>([<span class="str">'Close'</span>])</pre>
  </div>

  <hr class="divider"/>

  <!-- ═══ KEY TAKEAWAYS ═══ -->
  <div class="section">
    <div class="section-label">Insights</div>
    <h2><span class="icon">💡</span> Key Takeaways</h2>
    <ul style="padding-left:20px; margin-top:10px;">
      <li style="color:#cdd9e5; font-size:14.5px; padding:5px 0;">LSTM networks effectively capture <strong>non-linear temporal patterns</strong> in noisy financial data</li>
      <li style="color:#cdd9e5; font-size:14.5px; padding:5px 0;">A <strong>60-week lookback window</strong> provides enough context to learn medium-term trends</li>
      <li style="color:#cdd9e5; font-size:14.5px; padding:5px 0;">The anomalous value <code style="background:var(--panel);padding:1px 6px;border-radius:4px;font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;font-size:12px;">1.5676</code> on 2022-06-08 highlights the importance of data cleaning in real-world pipelines</li>
      <li style="color:#cdd9e5; font-size:14.5px; padding:5px 0;">More epochs, dropout regularisation, and technical indicator features would improve accuracy</li>
    </ul>
  </div>

  <hr class="divider"/>

  <!-- ═══ FUTURE WORK ═══ -->
  <div class="section">
    <div class="section-label">Roadmap</div>
    <h2><span class="icon">🔮</span> Future Improvements</h2>
    <ul class="checklist">
      <li>Add dropout regularisation and increase training epochs to reduce overfitting</li>
      <li>Incorporate technical indicators (RSI, MACD, Bollinger Bands) as multi-variate features</li>
      <li>Expand to multi-step forecasting — predict next N weeks simultaneously</li>
      <li>Hyperparameter tuning with Keras Tuner or Optuna</li>
      <li>Deploy as a live dashboard using Streamlit or Dash</li>
    </ul>
  </div>

  <hr class="divider"/>

  <!-- ═══ REFERENCES ═══ -->
  <div class="section">
    <div class="section-label">References</div>
    <h2><span class="icon">📚</span> References</h2>
    <ul style="padding-left:20px; margin-top:10px;">
      <li style="color:#cdd9e5; font-size:14px; padding:4px 0;"><a href="https://keras.io/api/layers/recurrent_layers/lstm/" style="color:var(--blue);">Keras LSTM Documentation</a></li>
      <li style="color:#cdd9e5; font-size:14px; padding:4px 0;"><a href="https://colah.github.io/posts/2015-08-Understanding-LSTMs/" style="color:var(--blue);">Understanding LSTMs — Colah's Blog</a></li>
      <li style="color:#cdd9e5; font-size:14px; padding:4px 0;"><a href="https://pypi.org/project/yfinance/" style="color:var(--blue);">yfinance Documentation</a></li>
      <li style="color:#cdd9e5; font-size:14px; padding:4px 0;">Hochreiter, S. & Schmidhuber, J. (1997). <em>Long Short-Term Memory</em>. Neural Computation.</li>
    </ul>
  </div>

</div>

<!-- ═══ FOOTER ═══ -->
<footer>
  <div class="author-chip">
    <span class="dot"></span>
    <strong>Ak28071999</strong>
  </div>
  <br>
  <a href="https://github.com/Ak28071999">github.com/Ak28071999</a>
  <br><br>
  <span style="font-size:12px;">Built for educational purposes — not financial advice.</span>
</footer>

</body>
</html>
